# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  resources:
    - name: myVNet
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      properties:
        location: eastus
        resourceGroupName: myResourceGroup
        sku: Standard_Basic
        subnetConfigurations:
          - name: internal
            addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
          - name: storage
            addressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
            privateLinkServiceConnectionSite:
              id: /subscriptions/subscriptionId/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/myVNet/subnets/storage
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
          - name: sql
            addressPrefix: 10.0.2.0/24
            privateLinkServiceConnectionSite:
              id: /subscriptions/subscriptionId/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/myVNet/subnets/sql
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
      dependencies: []

    - name: myNSG
      type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      properties:
        location: eastus
        resourceGroupName: myResourceGroup
        securityRules:
          - name: AllowInternet
            priority: 1000
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: *
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
          - name: AllowOnPremises
            priority: 1001
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: *
            sourcePortRange: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '*'
            sourceAddressPrefix: ContainedIn (variables['onPremisesAddressSpace'])
            destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
      dependencies: [parameters('myVNet')]

    - name: mySubnetNSGAssociation-internal
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkSubnets/networkSecurityGroups
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      properties:
        networkSecurityGroup:
          id: /subscriptions/subscriptionId/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/myNSG
      dependencies: [parameters('myVNet'), parameters('myNSG')]
      name:
        value: internal

    - name: mySubnetNSGAssociation-storage
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkSubnets/networkSecurityGroups
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      properties:
        networkSecurityGroup:
          id: /subscriptions/subscriptionId/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/myNSG
      dependencies: [parameters('myVNet'), parameters('myNSG')]
      name:
        value: storage

    - name: mySubnetNSGAssociation-sql
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkSubnets/networkSecurityGroups
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      properties:
        networkSecurityGroup:
          id: /subscriptions/subscriptionId/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/myNSG
      dependencies: [parameters('myVNet'), parameters('myNSG')]
      name:
        value: sql

variables:
  onPremisesAddressSpace: '10.0.0.0/16'
parameters:
  subscriptionId: string
  myResourceGroup: string
